title: canarium egregium
intro: Canarium egregium, also known as the 'Wild Lime', is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Canarium egregium include treating skin conditions, wound healing, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for a variety of health issues.
